summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard conservatively. No GitHub mutations, merges, closes, or fix artifacts are planned because the job disables fix/merge/post-merge/instant-close paths and this is not a dedupe cluster. Open PRs remain independently tracked; the one hydrated security-sensitive linked ref is routed to central security handling only.

actions.reason: Distinct active contributor PR with maintainer signal and unresolved review work; keep open as independent inventory item.
Focused active bug-fix PR; no close or merge path is allowed in this inventory job.

Broad active PR with unresolved review/check risk; keep open independently.

Large active i18n PR with unresolved review issues and uneditable branch; keep open independently.
Exact hydrated security-sensitive linked ref must be routed to central OpenClaw security handling without affecting unrelated PR inventory decisions.
